language_focus: to be (I am / you are)، What's your name? / How old are you?، Hello / Goodbye.
vocab_key: hello, goodbye, please, thank you, yes, no, name, age, numbers one–twenty, welcome, sorry, fine, OK, meet, boy, girl, man, woman, people, person, nice, good
vocab_thematic: hi, bye, spell, child, teenager, hey, letter
l1_interference: فعل الكون (I **am**…).

language_focus: this/that، What's this? It's a…، a/an، الأوامر (sit down, open your book).
vocab_key: book, bag, table, chair, red, blue, green, yellow, black, white, school, teacher, student, class, lesson, word, study, learn, paper, question, answer, ask
vocab_thematic: pen, pencil, desk, classroom, board, brown, orange, pink, purple, picture, dictionary, page, grey, repeat
l1_interference: a/an.

language_focus: have got (I have got a brother)، he/she is، الملكية (my/your/his/her).
vocab_key: family, mother, father, brother, sister, friend, parent, husband, wife, married, old, young, love, neighbour, kind, live, year, help
vocab_thematic: mum, dad, grandmother, grandfather, baby, son, daughter, aunt, uncle, cousin, grandparent
l1_interference: فعل الكون (She **is** my sister) · الملكية.

language_focus: have got (I have got brown eyes)، الجمع، الصفة + الاسم.
vocab_key: body, head, hand, eye, big, small, happy, sad, angry, hungry, tired, feel, beautiful, laugh, look
vocab_thematic: hair, face, ear, nose, mouth, arm, leg, foot, tooth, tall, short, thirsty, pretty, fat, dark
l1_interference: ترتيب الصفة (brown eyes) · الجمع.

language_focus: can (a bird can fly — تُدوَّر في U08 لقدرة الذات، تدويرٌ مقصود)، like + noun، الجمع.
vocab_key: animal, dog, cat, bird, fish, run, jump, swim, tree, flower, garden, grow, walk, eat, sea
vocab_thematic: horse, cow, sheep, pig, chicken, lion, elephant, snake, mouse, fly, farm, farmer, beach
l1_interference: /p/-/b/ (pet · bet).
content_note: تُقدَّم بنبرةٍ تناسب ١٣ (حقائق مدهشة/تحدّيات)، لا نبرة أطفال.

language_focus: like / don't like، present simple (I like)، some.
vocab_key: food, bread, milk, water, egg, rice, meat, apple, breakfast, lunch, dinner, meal, drink, cook, fruit, vegetable, coffee, like, want
vocab_thematic: juice, tea, cheese, banana, orange, tomato, potato, carrot, cake, chocolate, ice cream, sandwich, salad, sugar, soup, cup, salt, pepper, glass, bottle, menu
l1_interference: like + اسم/-ing · do/does في السؤال والنفي (Do you like…? · I don't like…).

language_focus: there is/are، تعابير الموقع (in/on/under)، this/these.
vocab_key: house, home, room, door, window, bed, phone, computer, bath, toilet, light, key, building, clean, open, close, street, city
vocab_thematic: bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, wall, floor, clock, TV, shower, radio, flat, apartment
l1_interference: أداة التعريف.

language_focus: can / can't (I can swim)، play + نشاط، present simple بسيط.
vocab_key: play, game, ball, read, write, ride, sport, team, player, hobby, watch, win, join, fun, enjoy, listen, make
vocab_thematic: football, tennis, dance, sing, draw, music, club, gym, swimming, guitar, paint, climb
l1_interference: can/can't + الفعل المجرّد (بلا «to») · do-support في الأسئلة (Do you play…?).
content_note: تُقدَّم بنبرةٍ تناسب ١٣ (تحدّياتٌ ومهاراتٌ حقيقية)، لا نبرة أطفال.

language_focus: present simple (It's sunny)، What day is it?، الأسئلة البسيطة.
vocab_key: day, week, weekend, weather, hot, cold, time, hour, month, today, tomorrow, morning, evening, night, clothes, summer, winter, afternoon
vocab_thematic: Monday–Sunday, sun, sunny, rain, snow, warm, coat, hat, jacket, shoe, T-shirt, minute, o'clock, season, spring, autumn, umbrella, cool
l1_interference: الأحرف الكبيرة لأيّام الأسبوع (Monday).

language_focus: to be / have got، الضمائر والملكية، مراجعة present simple وتوسيعه، صفات الوصف، أسئلة wh.
vocab_key: family, parent, neighbour, clever, friendly, polite, careful, serious, country, national, adult, kid, guy, character, personality, male, female, human, behaviour, rude, manner
vocab_thematic: partner, twin, member, intelligent, lazy, nervous, creative, funny, foreign, international, abroad, capital, lady, behave, attractive, ordinary, unusual, hero, king, queen
l1_interference: فعل الكون (He **is** happy) · أداة التعريف/التنكير · ترتيب الصفة (red car).

language_focus: present simple (إثبات/نفي/سؤال)، ظروف التكرار، `like/love/hate + -ing`.
vocab_key: routine, daily, wake, prepare, exercise, hobby, morning, afternoon, evening, early, late, weekend, habit, rest, sleep, chat, active, compete
vocab_thematic: relax, tidy, collect, painting, drawing, photograph, fishing, camping, skiing, cooking, midnight, cycle, running, joke, cartoon, drama, comedy, novel, musician, instrument, secret, diary, competition
l1_interference: سين الغائب المفرد (he play**s**).

language_focus: there is/are، حروف المكان، some/any، how many، صيغة الأمر للاتجاهات.
vocab_key: furniture, town, station, hospital, hotel, bank, park, market, direction, corner, inside, outside, roof, hall, distance, ground, left, right
vocab_thematic: cupboard, fridge, oven, cooker, lamp, mirror, carpet, museum, library, supermarket, bridge, castle, straight, towards, opposite, towel, soap, stair, gallery, church, factory, north, south, east, west
l1_interference: أداة التعريف (go to **the** station).

language_focus: معدود/غير معدود، some/any/much/many، would like / can I have، How much، should (نصيحة).
vocab_key: meal, breakfast, lunch, dinner, fruit, vegetable, sugar, shop, shopping, price, cost, cheap, expensive, health, healthy, ill, medicine, pain, heart, plate, medical, patient, flu
vocab_thematic: soup, salad, sauce, sweet, butter, jam, bean, beef, chip, biscuit, recipe, chef, dish, taste, delicious, customer, cash, sale, bill, illness, disease, dentist, headache, stomach, knee, neck, shoulder, skin, bowl, spoon, knife, fork

language_focus: present continuous، الفرق بينه وبين present simple، يرتدي + ملابس.

language_focus: past simple (was/were، المنتظمة، الشاذّة الشائعة)، تعابير الزمن الماضي، first/then/after that.
vocab_key: visit, travel, arrive, stay, return, journey, trip, holiday, beach, sea, mountain, river, view, coast, adventure, experience, memory, gift, guide, guest
vocab_thematic: ocean, hill, lake, forest, island, valley, desert, camp, tour, tourist, tourism, traveller, passenger, scene, wood, grass, field, rock, stone

language_focus: comparatives، superlatives، as...as، صفاتٌ للمقارنة.
vocab_key: animal, bird, nature, tree, sky, earth, big, tall, long, high, low, fast, slow, strong, heavy, light, building, wild, moon, thick, soft, bright, loud, round, shape, square

l1_interference: ترتيب الصفة والاسم في تراكيب المقارنة.

language_focus: be going to (نيّة/خطّة)، will (تنبّؤ + قرار لحظيّ/عرض: I'll help)، present continuous للترتيبات، would like to، تعابير الزمن المستقبليّ.
vocab_key: party, plan, future, tomorrow, tonight, soon, later, celebrate, invite, arrange, wish, hope, chance, opportunity, decision, promise, meeting
vocab_thematic: holiday, festival, event, invitation, trip, visit, weekend, next, arrangement, wedding, prize, award, program

language_focus: can/could (القدرة)، must / have to (الإلزام)، should (النصيحة)، mustn't.
vocab_key: sport, team, player, match, skill, train, practice, rule, safe, careful, allow, danger, athlete, winner, goal, ability, able, manage, control, beat, practise
vocab_thematic: football, tennis, basketball, baseball, swimming, skiing, golf, coach, score, race, permission, sign, uniform, runner, hockey, fan

language_focus: حروف الحركة (to/by/from)، مراجعة الأزمنة، عباراتٌ وظيفية (When does it leave? · How do I get to…? · A ticket to…).
vocab_key: transport, bus, train, plane, taxi, road, map, ticket, station, airport, time, hour, arrive, leave, engine, route, seat, speed, wait, ride, flight
vocab_thematic: boat, ship, lorry, truck, van, underground, railway, vehicle, traffic, wheel, platform, gate, passport, schedule, minute, journey, trip, motorcycle, petrol, sail

language_focus: الماضي البسيط مقابل الماضي المستمرّ · روابط التسلسل (first/then/after that/finally) · used to.
vocab_key: tell, happen, begin, continue, decide, explain, describe, find, lose, follow, moment, recently, pretend, mystery, wonder, truth, lie, meanwhile, imagine, surprise, fear
vocab_thematic: realize, discover, notice, adventure, explore, escape, journey, hide, search, period, eventually, suddenly, expedition, frightened, frightening, imaginary, magic, narrative, plot, theme, scary, chapter, episode
l1_interference: صيغ الماضي الشاذّة · «was/were + ing» · تفادي السرد بزمن المضارع.

language_focus: صيغ المستقبل (will / going to / المضارع المستمرّ للترتيبات) · might للاحتمال · want/hope/plan + to.
vocab_key: job, career, doctor, nurse, engineer, manager, goal, dream, hope, succeed, success, achieve, aim, intend, determined, qualified, qualify, employment, apply, talent, leader, employer, employee, boss, colleague, business, interview
vocab_thematic: profession, architect, lawyer, journalist, scientist, designer, pilot, professor, director, dentist, athlete, ambition, ambitious, achievement, qualification, intention, staff, retire, application, talented, salary
l1_interference: تمييز will عن going to · مصدر الغرض (to + فعل) · لا مُعلِّم مستقبلٍ مزدوج.

language_focus: عبارات الرأي (I think/believe, in my opinion) · الموافقة/الاعتراض · روابط because/so/although.
vocab_key: opinion, agree, disagree, prefer, believe, suggest, reason, important, useful, interesting, favourite, choose, convince, persuade, doubt, accept, admit, obvious, claim, prove, confused, wonderful, terrible
vocab_thematic: suggestion, argue, argument, comment, attitude, excellent, brilliant, awful, fair, unfair, boring, exciting, amazing, choice, conclude, conclusion, sensible, silly, horrible, pleasant, unpleasant, confuse, fantastic
l1_interference: ترتيب because مقابل so · although/but · ترتيب الجملة التابعة.

language_focus: المقارنة والتفضيل (موسّعة) · الجمل الوصفية (which/who/where) · وصف الأماكن.
vocab_key: place, area, travel, transport, flight, beautiful, modern, famous, busy, local, mountain, river, location, accommodation, arrival, departure, sight, historical, peaceful, central
vocab_thematic: region, countryside, coast, valley, desert, forest, lake, ocean, island, border, continent, nation, journey, tour, tourist, route, destination, traveller, ancient, historic, crowded, reservation, luxury, cottage, port, remote, eastern, western, package, sailor
l1_interference: ضمائر الوصل · «more…than» مقابل «-er» · أداة التعريف مع الأماكن.

language_focus: النصح والإلزام (مستوى B1): had better للنصح القويّ · should/shouldn't · والتمييز الحاسم must / have to / don't have to / mustn't (إلزام · لا إلزام · منع) — نقلةٌ شكليةٌ على A2-U09.
vocab_key: body, heart, brain, skin, pain, health, healthy, exercise, energy, habit, medicine, illness, breath, breathe, advise, regularly, suffer, weight, weigh
vocab_thematic: bone, blood, muscle, throat, stomach, chest, shoulder, knee, ankle, disease, flu, headache, injury, injured, painful, symptom, medical, patient, treatment, fitness, diet, stress, fresh, breathing, tongue, toe, lip, nail, ingredient, bake, fry, spicy
l1_interference: should/must + الفعل المجرّد (بلا «to») · have to مقابل must.

language_focus: المضارع التامّ (التجربة: have you ever…) · المضارع التامّ مقابل الماضي البسيط.
vocab_key: computer, mobile, screen, internet, online, website, email, message, app, download, file, data, social, safety, protect, access, account, click, update, connection, technical, identity, technology, document
vocab_thematic: laptop, tablet, smartphone, printer, device, robot, battery, keyboard, network, software, program, digital, virus, media, security, private, warn, warning, function, signal, channel, reliable, illegal, ignore, electronic, code, profile
l1_interference: تكوين المضارع التامّ (have + التصريف الثالث) · ever/never · **المضارع التامّ مقابل الماضي البسيط (تداخلٌ رئيس)**.

language_focus: الشرطية الأولى (if you help…, …) · الاقتراح والعرض (why don't we · let's · shall we).
vocab_key: community, society, public, local, group, help, share, offer, save, support, kind, care, responsibility, responsible, duty, grateful, favour, assist, participate, organize, equal
vocab_thematic: neighbour, neighbourhood, member, volunteer, charity, donate, generous, provide, protect, serve, encourage, supporter, campaign, organizer, poverty, organized, equally
l1_interference: زمن الشرطية الأولى (if + مضارع، will + مجرّد) · صيغ الاقتراح.

language_focus: أنماط الأفعال (enjoy/like + ing · want/need + to) · التعبير عن التفضيل (prefer · would rather).
vocab_key: subject, science, history, study, learn, exam, lesson, homework, understand, remember, teach, improve, practise, knowledge, educate, academic, degree, grade, summary, analyse, method, focus, education, intelligence
vocab_thematic: maths, geography, biology, chemistry, physics, art, music, literature, revise, course, assignment, essay, project, research, prepare, concentrate, educated, summarize, analysis, presentation, performance

language_focus: الشرطية الصفرية والأولى (سبب/نتيجة) · المبنيّ للمجهول البسيط للعمليات (is made · are grown).
vocab_key: nature, natural, environment, plant, forest, river, sky, earth, energy, protect, save, weather, wind, animal, leaf, branch, earthquake, fuel, growth, reduce
vocab_thematic: environmental, soil, seed, ocean, planet, pollution, recycle, waste, climate, global, damage, storm, flood, hurricane, temperature, insect, wild, fur, tail, wing, bee, nuclear, coal, gas, electricity, rock, stone

language_focus: صفات -ed/-ing (bored/boring) · النقل المباشر البسيط (he said that…) · الجمل الوصفية (who).
vocab_key: feeling, proud, worried, scared, confident, kind, friendly, honest, polite, respect, friendship, care, amazed, annoyed, disappointed, glad, trust, mood, react
vocab_thematic: emotion, surprised, embarrassed, lonely, calm, upset, nervous, rude, shy, brave, generous, patient, gentle, relative, apologize, manner, annoying, guilty, cheerful, relaxed, loyal, gentleman, sincere, supportive, reaction

language_focus: وحدةٌ تكامليةٌ ختامية — وصف المناسبات (مراجعة الأزمنة: ماضٍ + مضارع) · المقارنة (as…as · more…than) — مراجعة · التسلسل — مراجعة.
vocab_key: celebrate, event, party, holiday, tradition, culture, meal, family, invite, guest, decorate, gift, present, welcome
vocab_thematic: occasion, celebration, festival, ceremony, wedding, traditional, cultural, custom, religion, religious, dish, sweet, gather, host, relative, invitation, greet, costume, folk, poem, poetry, native
